title: Christmas Candy Cane Decorations - Plastic Candy Canes, Tree Hanging Ornaments for Winter Holiday Home Decor
features: 🎅🏻【WHAT YOU WILL GET】: You will receive 6 pcs glitter candy canes in a box, the box size is 14cm x 13cm.Christmas Glitter Candy Cane decorate your home and brighten up your Christmas
🎅🏻【Quality Material】: Our Christmas candy cane is made of premium plastic, not easy to fade or break, can be used for next time.
🎅🏻【Easy to Use】: The candy cane is glitter, comes with a gold top and gold string loop attached,easy to hang anywhere you want to decorate. A great choice for festival decoration
🎅🏻【Festive Design】Christmas tree ornaments candy canes are coated with a layer of glitter powder, which can sparkle in the sun and light, adding to the Christmas atmosphere.
【Widely Applications】: Prefect for decorating Christmas tree,Christmas wreaths, and Christmas lights, door, wall, windows, wreaths, desk, table, stores, offices etc. Especially for Christmas Parties
description: Product description Wide Application The Christmas tree hanging ornaments can be served as Christmas decorations to be hung on Christmas trees and potted plants, you can also display them on your fireplace, doors, windows, to create a festive atmosphere or add them to other gifts to express your blessings and love to others Fun Candy Land Christmas Ornaments The kids love these candy canes and they can't wait to hang these sparkling candy decorations on the Christmas tree themselves! Christmas Tree Decorations They’re darling on your Christmas tree, which will add colorful sweetness to your tree and create a lively festive mood for your Christmas Safety Warning Choking hazard - small parts. Not suitable for children under 3 years.
